title: Detailed dragon Armors
description: Visually enhances the dragon armors of the Ice and Fire mod.
body:
# Welcome to the Detailed dragon Armors Modrinth page!

This resource pack was created in order to change some stuff regarding the well-known *Ice and Fire: Dragons* mod! ([link to its page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-dragons)). But what does this resource pack do, exactly?

The title is quite self-explanatory: it changes dragon armors. *Detailed dragon Armors* aims at the goal of giving them an enhanced look without drifting too far away from the original ones. Mainly using color/tone adjustments and texture shading, you can now see your flying reptiles wear armors that look a bit less flat-colored.

 *Note: If you spot an issue or desire to provide some feedback, feel free to let me know!*

### More details

The resource pack tends to slightly redesign the armors while keeping the spirit of the original ones, so every one of them is a little bit unique in its own way. Saddles and possible ornaments are dragon type dependent, which means their color changes depending on if your dragon is a fire, ice or lightning one!

Since the **1.4** version of Detailed dragon Armors, all the dragon armors are supported! The **1.4** version is specified as technically compatible with both **1.18.2** and **1.16.5** versions of *Ice and Fire: Dragons*. Feel free to report any issues. The next and last step for the resource pack's final version is adjustments regarding a few armors, including the correcting of minor texture mistakes and/or old styles that don't fit the resource pack anymore.

Thank you for reading!
